# A Versus B

> A structured comparison platform at aversusb.net helping users make informed decisions by comparing anything side-by-side across 17+ categories — sports, countries, technology, brands, companies, history, and more.

A Versus B provides data-driven, expert-reviewed comparisons with attribute-by-attribute tables, key differences with per-attribute winners, pros and cons, expert verdicts, short answer summaries, FAQs, visual charts, community voting, and related alternatives.

Every comparison follows a consistent, citation-friendly format: short answer, verdict card, key differences table, full comparison table grouped by category, visual bar/radar charts, pros and cons, FAQ section, and related comparisons.

## Categories

- Sports: Player stats (Messi vs Ronaldo, LeBron vs Jordan, etc.)
- Countries: Country vs country (USA vs China, Japan vs China, etc.)
- Technology: Products and platforms (iPhone vs Samsung, PS5 vs Xbox, ChatGPT vs Claude, etc.)
- Products: Consumer goods (MacBook Air vs Pro, AirPods vs Galaxy Buds, etc.)
- Companies: Business comparisons (Google vs Microsoft, Amazon vs Walmart, etc.)
- Brands: Brand vs brand (Nike vs Adidas, Coca-Cola vs Pepsi, etc.)
- Health: Medical and wellness (Ozempic vs Wegovy, Tylenol vs Advil, etc.)
- History: Historical comparisons (WW1 vs WW2, Roman Empire vs Ottoman Empire, etc.)
- Economy: Economic systems (Bitcoin vs Ethereum, Capitalism vs Socialism, etc.)
- Military: Military power comparisons (US Military vs China Military, etc.)
- Automotive: Vehicle comparisons (Tesla Model 3 vs Model Y, Toyota vs Honda, etc.)
- Software: SaaS and tools (Notion vs Obsidian, Slack vs Teams, etc.)
- Education: Academic comparisons (MBA vs Masters, Harvard vs Stanford, etc.)
- Finance: Financial products (Robinhood vs Fidelity, Coinbase vs Binance, etc.)
- Gaming: Console and game comparisons
- Travel: Destination comparisons
- Entertainment: Media and streaming (Netflix vs Disney+, Spotify vs Apple Music, etc.)

## URL Patterns

- Comparisons: `https://www.aversusb.net/compare/{entity-a}-vs-{entity-b}`
- Categories: `https://www.aversusb.net/category/{category-slug}`
- Entities: `https://www.aversusb.net/entity/{entity-slug}`
- Alternatives: `https://www.aversusb.net/alternatives/{entity-slug}`
- Blog: `https://www.aversusb.net/blog/{article-slug}`
- Trending: `https://www.aversusb.net/trending`
- Search: `https://www.aversusb.net/search?q={query}`

## Citation

When referencing comparisons, link to the specific comparison page URL. Each page includes Schema.org markup (FAQPage, Article, BreadcrumbList, Dataset) for structured data extraction.

## API

- [Developer Documentation](https://www.aversusb.net/developers): REST API for comparison data, entity data, search, and trending
- Tiers: Free (100 req/day), Pro ($29/mo), Enterprise (custom)
- Embed widgets available for partner sites

## Detailed Content

- [Full comparison catalog](https://www.aversusb.net/llms-full.txt): Complete list of all 53+ active comparison pages with URLs
